actorTitle: Vietnam Gym Lead Scraper with Emails
shortDescription: Scrape gym and fitness center leads from Google Maps in Vietnam and extract emails when available.
longDescription: This Actor searches Google Maps for gyms and fitness centers in Vietnam, extracts business details, and attempts to find email addresses from available websites. It is useful for fitness equipment suppliers, wellness platforms, B2B sales teams, and local marketing agencies.
targetUser: Fitness equipment suppliers, wellness platforms, B2B sales teams, and local marketing agencies.
buyerPainPoint: Locating active gyms and decision-maker contact channels across a city is slow when done listing by listing.
differentiation: Fitness-niche Google Maps discovery with optional public website email extraction and lead-quality scoring.
